accountsLead: Connected mailboxes. Click for account settings, signature and servers.
apiLead: Local access for agents and scripts. The server listens only on 127.0.0.1; every token is limited to the selected permissions.
apiTokenWarning: Copy the token now — it will not be shown again.
mailPasswordDesc: The password is stored only in the system credential store. Use an app password for Mail.ru, iCloud and JMAP.
alignmentDesc: Left - next to the start of the message; right - at the right edge.
autostartDesc: truemail will start automatically and minimize to the tray. Open the window from the tray icon.
backupPasswordDesc: At least 12 characters. Recovery is impossible without this password.
calendarsLead: Calendars are now configured inside the relevant account: truemail detects CalDAV, Exchange or iCal automatically.
clearAllLocalDesc: Messages will be re-downloaded from the servers
codeExpired: The code expired or was already used. Select Connect to get a new code.
commandPlaceholder: Search: mail, contacts, commands, settings - any keyboard layout
confirmationCodeDesc: Copy the code from the Yandex ID page after signing in.
connected: Account connected: mail, calendar and contacts are ready.
connecting: Checking access and loading mail, calendar and contacts…
connectionDesc: The provider and available services are detected automatically.
connectSub: Enter any address — truemail will detect the provider and choose a sign-in method.
creatingStorage: Creating keys and the encrypted database…
dataFolderTip: Where truemail keeps the encrypted local copy of mail, attachments and the index. You can place it on a separate or encrypted drive.
enterCode: After signing in, paste the confirmation code here.
expertModeDesc: Show advanced settings and fields (most people do not need them). By default, only what is essential for daily work.
foldersLead: Map mailbox folders to truemail roles so unified "Sent", "Drafts" and so on work the same for every account.
foldersNote: Special folders are detected automatically, but you can reassign them manually.
globalShortcuts: Global (work even when the window is minimized)
globalShortcutsTip: System-wide shortcuts: they fire across the whole OS, even if truemail is minimized or you are in another app. For example, quickly compose a message or show the window without opening the app with the mouse.
importThemeDesc: A truemail-theme/v1 JSON file with theme, density, accent, and ui_scale.
keyBackupDesc: An encrypted backup lets you open the local archive after reinstalling or losing the system credential-store keys.
keySub: Move the mouse inside the area until the bar is full. The movements are used once and are never stored.
languageSub: You can change it later in Settings.
linkTextPlaceholder: How it appears in the message
localShortcutsTip: Work when the truemail window is open. Classic mail shortcuts for fast, mouse-free work.
notifyPositionDesc: Corner of the primary monitor where new mail cards and reminders appear.
oauthUnavailable: Account connection is available in the desktop app.
oldAttachmentsDesc: They stay on the server and download when opened
openingYandex: Opening Yandex ID in your browser…
previewLinesDesc: How many lines of message text to show under the subject in the list.
privacyLead: Secure settings are already active. Here is only what is genuinely up to you.
protectionDesc: HTML messages open without scripts in an isolated container. Remote images are blocked; you can allow them per sender. The database and local files are encrypted.
restoreArchive: Or restore the keys for an existing archive
ruleApplyExisting: Also apply to already loaded messages
rulesLead: Automatically process new messages by sender or subject: move them to a folder, archive, spam or trash.
securityLocal: All mail is stored locally on this device
securityRecovery: Save a password-protected key backup in Storage: it restores access to the local archive after reinstalling.
securitySub: Nothing to configure — secure defaults are already active.
securityTokens: OAuth tokens are kept in the system credential store
securityTracking: Tracking pixels and UTM parameters are blocked
setupWizardDesc: Choose the language again and connect an account.
showConversationsDesc: Group a thread into a single row with a counter (by subject and reply chain, within an account). Click to expand every message in the conversation.
smartLead: Folders that gather messages by conditions (all inboxes, with attachments, from today and any of your own). Reorder, show or hide, and edit conditions.
smartLogicHelp: Within each group choose "AND" or "OR". Groups are always combined with "OR".
storageLead: truemail keeps an encrypted local copy of your mail for speed and offline work. Here you can see what takes up space, where it is stored and how storage is configured.
storageSub: Encrypted mail, calendars, contacts and the search index will be stored here.
themesLead: Themes apply on the fly and change not only color but also element sizes. You can import other themes.
themeSub: You can change the theme, density and accent at any time.
toolbarLead: Choose which buttons appear above an open message and in what order. The toggle on the right shows the button; the arrows reorder it.
unifiedLead: Choose the physical mailbox folders that smart folders can gather messages from. By default all folders take part. For example, "All inboxes" additionally keeps only sources with the Inbox role.
unifiedNote: A folder disabled here will not appear in any smart folder. The conditions themselves - "inbox", "last 24 hours", "with attachments" - are edited in the "Smart folders" section.
welcomeSub: A fast, comfortable and beautiful email client. All your mail stays local on your device.
